_meta.note: All products are real SKUs sold by SCG (COTTO tiles & sanitary, SCG Excella roofing, SCG SmartBoard) or by SCG Home retail stores (TOA/BEGER paint). Each entry has a source_url pointing to a public retail page on HomePro, OneStockHome, COTTO Life, or Thaiwatsadu. price_verified=true when the price was read directly from that page; price_verified=false when it is a mid-market estimate (the linked page may have current pricing).

products.name_en: COTTO Sonic Marble Grey 60×60 (HYG)
